title: Perform Periodic and Real-Time Scans
description: Perform periodic scans of organizational systems and real-time scans of files from external sources as files are downloaded, opened, or executed.

checks.name: Scheduled Full System Scan is Configured
checks.purpose: Verify a periodic full or quick system scan is scheduled and active in Windows Defender or the installed EDR solution

checks.name: Real-Time On-Access Scanning is Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm real-time scanning is enabled to scan files at download, open, or execution time

checks.name: Last Scheduled Scan Completed Successfully
checks.purpose: Verify the last scheduled scan ran and completed within the configured schedule window without errors

checks.name: Removable Media Scanning is Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm the antivirus solution scans removable media (USB drives, external storage) when connected or accessed

checks.name: Scheduled Full System Scan is Configured
checks.purpose: Verify a periodic scan is scheduled and active on the server

checks.name: Real-Time On-Access Scanning is Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm real-time scanning is enabled on the server

checks.name: Last Scheduled Scan Completed Successfully
checks.purpose: Verify the last scheduled scan ran and completed within the configured schedule window without errors

checks.name: Downloaded and Staged Files are Scanned Before Execution
checks.purpose: Confirm files transferred to the server via SFTP, file share, or staging directory are scanned before execution or deployment

checks.name: Scheduled ClamAV Scan is Configured
checks.purpose: Verify a periodic ClamAV or equivalent scan is scheduled via cron or systemd timer

checks.name: On-Access or Real-Time Scanning is Configured
checks.purpose: Confirm ClamAV on-access scanning or an equivalent real-time scanning daemon (clamonacc, fanotify) is active

checks.name: Last Scan Log Exists and Has Recent Results
checks.purpose: Verify a scan log exists with recent scan results confirming periodic scanning is occurring

checks.name: Scheduled ClamAV Scan is Configured
checks.purpose: Verify a periodic ClamAV scan is scheduled via cron or systemd timer on Debian

checks.name: On-Access or Real-Time Scanning is Configured
checks.purpose: Confirm ClamAV on-access scanning or equivalent is active on Debian

checks.name: Last Scan Log Exists and Has Recent Results
checks.purpose: Verify a scan log exists with recent scan results on Debian

remediation: Configure a scheduled full scan in Windows Defender or the installed EDR. Enable real-time protection. Ensure removable media is scanned on connection. On Linux, configure a ClamAV cron job and enable clamonacc for on-access scanning. Retain scan logs and alert on scan failures or detections.
